chunks.text: That's how we life A PostDoc's Life in California At our home in Oakland ... ... we join the Amrican Way of Life. During our free time, you can find us ... "speeding", .... posing for the press, ... in the air, ... ... or simply "on the rocks". We en

n the air, ... ... or simply "on the rocks". We enjoy the life here in the Bay Area, eventhough we sometimes miss our home countries a little bit. back to Wolfgang's homepage Zesch Wolfgang, last updated Dec. 12, 1997
